---
title: "Proportions"
output: html_document
date: "2023-08-07"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(Seurat)
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(reshape2)
library(treemapify)
```

```{r find-markers, warning=F, message=F}
set.seed(1234)
proj_name <- "FLCvNML"
```

```{r}
harmonized.seurat <- readRDS('./revisedDataset/rds/FLCvNML_Named-obj.rds')
```

```{r}
new_metadata <- data.frame(
  SampleID = colnames(harmonized.seurat),
  NewColumn = c("Value1", "Value2", "Value3")  # Replace with your new metadata values
)
```

```{r}
patient.id.status <- data.frame(id = c(unique(harmonized.seurat@meta.data[["id"]])),
                                `Patient-Status` = c("Patient 1:NML", "Patient 2:NML", "Patient 3:NML", "Patient 4:NML", 
                                                     "Patient 5:FLC-Pri", "Patient 1: FLC-Pri", "Patient 2:FLC-Pri", "Patient 4:FLC-Pri", "Patient 6:FLC-Pri", "Patient 7:FLC-Pri"))
```

```{r Gernerate count and percent dataframes of patient per cluster}
count_per_cluster <- as.data.frame(table(harmonized.seurat$cluster_id_named, harmonized.seurat$id)) %>% 
  dplyr::rename(Cluster = "Var1") %>% 
  dplyr::rename(id = "Var2") %>% 
  dplyr::rename(Count = "Freq") %>% 
  right_join(patient.id.status, by = "id")
  
percent_per_cluster <- as.data.frame(prop.table(table(harmonized.seurat$cluster_id_named, harmonized.seurat$id), margin = 1)) %>% 
  dplyr::rename(Cluster = "Var1") %>% 
  dplyr::rename(id = "Var2") %>% 
  dplyr::rename(Fraction = "Freq") %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(Percent = (Fraction * 100)) %>% 
  right_join(patient.id.status, by = "id")

percent_per_patient <- as.data.frame(prop.table(table(harmonized.seurat$cluster_id_named, harmonized.seurat$id), margin = 2)) %>% 
  dplyr::rename(Cluster = "Var1") %>% 
  dplyr::rename(id = "Var2") %>% 
  dplyr::rename(Fraction = "Freq") %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(Percent = (Fraction * 100)) %>% 
  right_join(patient.id.status, by = "id")

count_per_cluster <- separate(count_per_cluster, col = `Patient.Status`, into = c("Patient", "TissueStatus"), sep = ":", remove = FALSE)
percent_per_cluster <- separate(percent_per_cluster, col = `Patient.Status`, into = c("Patient", "TissueStatus"), sep = ":", remove = FALSE)
percent_per_patient <- separate(percent_per_patient, col = `Patient.Status`, into = c("Patient", "TissueStatus"), sep = ":", remove = FALSE)

write.csv(count_per_cluster, "./revisedDataset/proportions/Proportions-patient-per-cluster-count-NAMED.csv")
write.csv(percent_per_cluster, "./revisedDataset/proportions/Proportions-patient-per-cluster-percent-NAMED.csv")
write.csv(percent_per_patient, "./revisedDataset/proportions/Proportions-cluster-per-patient-percent-NAMED.csv")
```

```{r Reorder x-axis for barplot}
# To make the the bargraph easily interpretable, we will reorder the Clusters to sequential order from lexicographic order.

## For counts
### Define the desired order of levels. We will do this by size order
cluster_sizes <- count_per_cluster %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Cluster) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(TotalSize = sum(Count)) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(desc(TotalSize))  # Arrange in descending order of size

### Reorder the levels of the "Cluster" factor based on their total sizes.
count_per_cluster$Cluster <- factor(count_per_cluster$Cluster, levels = cluster_sizes$Cluster)

### It should now be in sequential order
levels(count_per_cluster$Cluster)
```


```{r}
dir.create(ggsave("./revisedDataset/proportions/Percent-cell-in-cluster-bySeuratCluster.png", width = 9, height = 5, units = "in", dpi = 600))
```

```{r}
sample_cluster_counts <- table(harmonized.seurat$cluster_id_named, harmonized.seurat$id)
sample_cluster_percent <- prop.table(sample_cluster_counts, margin = 1)
```

```{r}
sample_cluster_df <- as.data.frame(sample_cluster_percent) %>% 
  rename(Cluster = Var1, ID = Var2)
```

```{r}
ggplot(sample_cluster_df, aes(x = Cluster, y = Freq, fill = id)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  labs(title = "Percentage of Cells from Each Sample in Each Cluster",
       x = "Cluster",
       y = "Percent") +
  theme_minimal() + 
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) 

ggsave("./revisedDataset/proportions/Percent-cell-in-cluster-bySeuratCluster.png", width = 9, height = 5, units = "in", dpi = 600)
```

```{r}
custom_order <- c("Patient 1: FLC-Pri", "Patient 2:FLC-Pri", "Patient 4:FLC-Pri", "Patient 5:FLC-Pri", "Patient 6:FLC-Pri", "Patient 7:FLC-Pri", "Patient 1:NML", "Patient 2:NML", "Patient 3:NML", "Patient 4:NML")

count_per_cluster$`Patient.Status` <- factor(percent_per_cluster$`Patient.Status`, levels = custom_order)
percent_per_cluster$`Patient.Status` <- factor(percent_per_cluster$`Patient.Status`, levels = custom_order)
percent_per_patient$`Patient.Status` <- factor(percent_per_patient$`Patient.Status`, levels = custom_order)
levels(percent_per_cluster$`Patient.Status`)
levels(count_per_cluster$`Patient.Status`)
levels(percent_per_patient$`Patient.Status`)
```

```{r Graph Count per cluster}
p1 <- ggplot(count_per_cluster, aes(x = Cluster, y = Count, fill = `Patient.Status`)) +
  geom_col(color = 'black') +
  theme_classic() +
  ylim(c(0, max(cluster_sizes$TotalSize))) + 
  theme(plot.margin = margin(1, 1, 1, 1, "in"),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 60,
                                   hjust = 1,
                                   size = 10,
                                   face = "bold")) +
          scale_fill_manual(values = c("#0072B2", #1
                             "#D55E00", #2
                             "#009E73", #3
                             "#CC79A7",  #4
                             "#926B40", #5
                             "#56B4E9", #6
                             "#E69F00",#7
                             "#F0E442", #8
                             "#009E73",  #9
                             "#0072B2", #10
                             "#D55E00", #11
                             "#DDCC77", #12
                             "#CC6677", #13
                             "#AA4499", #14
                             "#882255",  #15
                             "#44AA99", #16
                             "#8A9FD1",#17
                             "#C06CAB", #18
                             "#89C75F", #19
                             "#9983BD", #20
                             "#F37B7D", #21
                             "#3BBCA8")) #22

p1 + ggsave(filename = "./revisedDataset/proportions/Proportions-count-per-cluster-NAMED-manualColors.png", width = 10, height = 10) 
```

```{r Graph cell-type percent per patient-sample}
p2 <- ggplot(percent_per_patient, aes(x = `Patient.Status`, y = Percent, fill = `Cluster`)) +
  geom_col(color = 'black') +
  theme_classic() +
  ylim(c(0, 101)) + 
  theme(plot.margin = margin(1, 1, 1, 1, "in"),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 60,
                                   hjust = 1,
                                   size = 10,
                                   face = "bold")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#33a02c",
                    "#763D24",
                    "#8C87E6",
                    "#66C4A4",
                    "#6a3d9a",
                    "#1f78b4",
                    "#ff7f00",
                    "#AF6E4D",
                    "#cab2d6",
                    "#fdbf6f",
                    "#a6cee3",
                    "#b2df8a", 
                    "#FF6B6B",
                    "#B22222",
                    "#b15928",
                    "#FFDB58"))

p2 + ggsave(filename = "./revisedDataset/proportions/Proportions-cluster-percent-by-PatientStatus-NAMED-manualColors.png", width = 10, height = 10)
```

```{r Graph Patient-status percent by cluster}
p3 <- percent_per_cluster %>%
  ggplot(., aes(Cluster, Percent, fill = `Patient.Status`)) +
  geom_col(color = 'black') +
  theme_classic() +
  ylim(c(0,101)) + 
  theme(plot.margin = margin(1, 1, 1, 1, "in"),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 60,
                                   hjust = 1,
                                   size = 10,
                                   face = "bold")) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#0072B2", #1
                             "#D55E00", #2
                             "#009E73", #3
                             "#CC79A7",  #4
                             "#926B40", #5
                             "#56B4E9", #6
                             "#E69F00",#7
                             "#F0E442", #8
                             "#009E73",  #9
                             "#0072B2", #10
                             "#D55E00", #11
                             "#DDCC77", #12
                             "#CC6677", #13
                             "#AA4499", #14
                             "#882255",  #15
                             "#44AA99", #16
                             "#8A9FD1",#17
                             "#C06CAB", #18
                             "#89C75F", #19
                             "#9983BD", #20
                             "#F37B7D", #21
                             "#3BBCA8" #22
                             )) 
p3 + ggsave(filename = "./revisedDataset/proportions/Proportions-PatientStatus-percent-by-Cluster-NAMED-manualColors.png", width = 10, height = 10)
```

```{r}
treemap_counts <- table(harmonized.seurat$status, harmonized.seurat$cluster_named) %>% 
  as.data.frame() %>% 
  dplyr::rename(Status = Var1, Cluster = Var2) 

treemap_flc <- treemap_counts %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Status == "FLC") %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(Proportion = Freq/sum(Freq)*100) %>% 
  dplyr::slice(c(-5,-11))

treemap_nml <- treemap_counts %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Status == "NML") %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(Proportion = Freq/sum(Freq)*100) %>% 
  dplyr::slice(c(-5,-11))
```

```{r}
treemap_flc_plot <- ggplot(treemap_flc, aes(area = Freq, fill = Cluster,
                                label = paste0(Cluster, "\nCount: ", Freq, "\nProportion: ", round(Proportion,1)))) +
  geom_treemap() +
  geom_treemap_text(size = 10, hjust = 0.5, vjust = 0.5, color = "black", fontface = "bold") +
  labs(title = "Treemap of Relative Cell Proportions within FLC",
       fill = "Tissue Status",
       caption = "Source: Khasayer Lab") +
  theme_minimal()

treemap_flc_plot + ggsave("revisedDataset/proportions/flc_treemap-removedClusters4_11.png", width = 9, height = 5, units = "in", dpi = 600)
```

```{r}
treemap_nml_plot <- ggplot(treemap_nml, aes(area = Freq, fill = Cluster,
                                label = paste0(Cluster, "\nCount: ", Freq, "\nProportion: ", round(Proportion,1)))) +
  geom_treemap() +
  geom_treemap_text(size = 10, hjust = 0.5, vjust = 0.5, color = "black", fontface = "bold") +
  labs(title = "Treemap of Relative Cell Proportions within NML",
       fill = "Tissue Status",
       caption = "Source: Khasayer Lab") +
  theme_minimal()

treemap_nml_plot + ggsave("revisedDataset/proportions/nml_treemap-removedClusters4_11.png", width = 9, height = 5, units = "in", dpi = 600)
```
